name: Strawberry Port Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the Port and water to simmering.
2. Remove from heat; add the gelatin and stir until dissolved.
3. Drop in the frozen block of strawberries and let thaw, breaking up the block with a fork to hasten the process. Add lemon juice.
4. Chill until the mixture begins to thicken.
5. Whisk together cream cheese and milk.
6. Spread evenly over the bottom of the pie shell.
7. Pour in the partially thickened gelatin mixture.
8. Chill several hours or overnight until firm.
9. Garnish with whipped cream before serving.
